title: codonopsis pilosula
intro: Codonopsis pilosula, also known as Dang Shen or Golden Thread, is a perennial plant native to China that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is often used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Codonopsis pilosula include improving lung function, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing overall well-being, making it a popular herb for treating conditions such as bronchitis, tuberculosis, and fatigue. Codonopsis pilosula can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
